findings.description: APK contains native library names associated with common Android packers.
findings.title: Known Android packer native library

findings.description: Manifest strings contain application class names or package prefixes commonly used by shell stubs.
findings.title: Manifest references packer stub application

findings.description: APK assets contain high-entropy data that may be encrypted payload material.
findings.title: High-entropy asset payload

findings.description: Strings or bytecode constants reference Android class-loading APIs used by packers and plugin loaders.
findings.title: Dynamic code loading indicators

findings.description: Native library exports or embeds JNI entrypoint strings, indicating Java-to-native execution paths.
findings.title: Native JNI entrypoint present
